# Speak Easy Words

> Learn English vocabulary with cartoon illustrations, IPA pronunciation, natural human voice, and translations into 16 languages. Upload a file or describe a topic — AI extracts the words and draws every one.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse built-in vocabulary categories and your AI-generated decks.
- [Add category](/upload): Upload a file (xlsx, csv, pdf, docx, txt) or describe a topic; AI builds an illustrated deck.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or log in to save your custom decks.
